ogTitle: Avoca Beach vs Avondale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Avoca Beach and Avondale.
heading: Avoca Beach vs Avondale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Avoca Beach, New South Wales and Avondale, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Avoca Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Avondale (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Avoca Beach or Avondale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Avoca Beach has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Avondale scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Avoca Beach scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Avondale scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Avoca Beach or Avondale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Avoca Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
